title: Message forwarding → relay token mismatch → 401
evidence: TC-031 passed all 8 tests in 1652ms: - Wrong X-Relay-Token → 401 {ok: false, error: 'Unauthorized'} - Missing X-Relay-Token → 401 {ok: false, error: 'Unauthorized'} - No MESSAGE_DELIVERED audit event for rejected messages - Correct relay token (with mocked fetch) → 200 {ok: true} - MESSAGE_DELIVERED audit event written with correct slackEventId Overall suite: 429/430 tests passing (TC-027 failure is pre-existing, unrelated)
